suggested_fixes: Replace `at::matmul(Bc.transpose(0, 1).contiguous(), Xc)` with `at::matmul(Bc.t(), Xc)` to avoid an explicit copy.
warnings: The implementation uses ATen operations only, no custom CUDA kernel; performance may be suboptimal compared to fused kernels.
Calling .contiguous() on B.transpose(0,1) creates an unnecessary copy; consider using at::matmul with transposed B directly (e.g., at::matmul(B.t(), Xc)).
